docs.title: Material UI: React components that implement Material Design

repo.title: GitHub - mui/material-ui: Material UI: Comprehensive React component library that implements Google's Material Design. Free forever. · GitHub

manifest_entry.name: Material UI
teaches: how a mature system handles customization
avoid: leaving the UI looking like untouched defaults
using design-system breadth as a substitute for product judgment
manifest_entry.why_this_matters: A useful reference for large component coverage, theming depth, and admin-heavy interfaces.
manifest_entry.reusable_lesson: A broad system is only premium when the product team shapes it intentionally.
